center.name: 阿尤群島
center.summary: 阿尤群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括王极乐鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The king bird-of-paradise is distributed throughout the majority of lowland New Guinea mainland, and on the surrounding islands, including Aru, Salawati, Missol, and Yapen, inhabiting mostly lowland rainforests, gallery forests, forest edges, and disturbed and tall secondary forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The king bird-of-paradise is distributed throughout the majority of lowland New Guinea mainland, and on the surrounding islands, including Aru, Salawati, Missol, and Yapen, inhabiting mostly lowland rainforests, gallery forests, forest edges, and disturbed and tall secondary forests
